name: martix-powershell

publisher.name: MartiXDev
publisher.distributionModel: standalone skill with direct Copilot marketplace registration

summary: Standalone-first MartiX skill package for compiled PowerShell cmdlet development in C#, covering base class selection, naming and conventions, parameter declaration and validation, pipeline input/output streaming, error handling, confirmation safety patterns, advanced patterns, and attribute validators.
abstract: This package is the canonical source for the MartiX PowerShell cmdlet skill. It ships the authored rule library, reference maps, maintainer docs, templates, and taxonomy for compiled binary cmdlet authoring in C# across 8 domains.

status.scaffoldNote: All 17 rule files are authored across 9 domains. The naming-approved-verbs-cmdlet-contract.md and naming-parameter-and-common-names.md rules form the naming domain. All 11 reference maps are authored.

rulePrefixes.foundation: Base class selection (Cmdlet vs PSCmdlet), Cmdlet attribute declaration, OutputType, SupportsShouldProcess, SupportsTransactions, assembly structure, module packaging, DLL naming, .psd1 manifest, Import-Module wiring
rulePrefixes.naming: Approved verb selection, Verbs* typed constants, verb group semantics, paired inverse verbs, vendor noun prefix, standard parameter names (Path, Name, Force, Credential, InputObject, PassThru), common parameter injection list, Credential attribute
rulePrefixes.parameters: Parameter attribute options, Mandatory, Position, ParameterSetName, HelpMessage, validation attribute stacking, standard parameter names, ValueFromPipeline, ValueFromPipelineByPropertyName, wildcard support, binding precedence
rulePrefixes.pipeline: BeginProcessing, ProcessRecord, EndProcessing, StopProcessing override patterns, WriteObject semantics, streaming vs buffering, object vs text output, null handling, OutputType declaration
rulePrefixes.error-handling: Terminating vs non-terminating error classification, ErrorRecord construction, exception object, ErrorId design, ErrorCategory enum selection, WriteError, ThrowTerminatingError, PSCmdlet error methods
rulePrefixes.confirmation-safety: SupportsShouldProcess, ShouldProcess call patterns, ShouldContinue nesting, ConfirmImpact level selection, WhatIf/Confirm automatic parameters, Force parameter bypass semantics, non-interactive automation safety
rulePrefixes.advanced-patterns: IDynamicParameters, RuntimeDefinedParameterDictionary, parameter aliases, ScriptBlock invocation via PSCmdlet, SessionState access, credential parameters, SupportsTransactions, CurrentPSTransaction
rulePrefixes.attributes-validators: ValidateSet, ValidateRange, ValidatePattern, ValidateScript, ValidateLength, ValidateCount, ValidateNotNull, ValidateNotNullOrEmpty, custom validation attributes, OutputType declaration, credential handling
rulePrefixes.documentation: Comment-based help block structure, required help sections (.SYNOPSIS, .DESCRIPTION, .PARAMETER, .EXAMPLE, .OUTPUTS, .NOTES), MAML/PlatyPS help for compiled cmdlets, .OUTPUTS/[OutputType] alignment, script-body alias avoidance, Read-Host prohibition, Write-Host stream semantics, Tier-5 repo style overlay

notes: Use the standalone package as the source of truth for local installs and direct folder-based validation.

For local installs use the full absolute folder path (e.g. C:\Git\MartiXDev\ai-marketplace\src\skills\martix-powershell). Relative paths such as .\src\skills\martix-powershell are treated as git URLs by the skills CLI on Windows and will fail.
Prefer the GitHub tree URL for non-local installs.

secondarySurface.strategy: register the canonical standalone package directly from skills

discovery.sameNameConflictRisk: A standalone project or personal install can shadow a future plugin-delivered copy with the same skill name.
discovery.recommendedValidationApproach: Use a clean environment or remove the standalone install before validating any future marketplace wrapper.

local.role: stable six-section contract that every PowerShell cmdlet rule file must follow

entry map for base class selection, Cmdlet attribute, module packaging, and assembly structure
entry map for approved verb selection, standard parameter names, and naming conventions
entry map for parameter declaration, validation attributes, standard names, pipeline binding, and parameter sets
entry map for BeginProcessing/ProcessRecord/EndProcessing overrides and output streaming
entry map for ErrorRecord construction, ErrorCategory enum, and terminating vs non-terminating decision
entry map for ShouldProcess, ShouldContinue, Force parameter, and ConfirmImpact patterns
entry map for IDynamicParameters, aliases, ScriptBlock invocation, session state, and transactions
entry map for validation attribute selection and OutputType patterns
entry map for help block required sections, .OUTPUTS/[OutputType] alignment, alias avoidance, stream guidance, and Tier-5 style overlay pointer
secondary recipe index linking advanced integration scenarios, cmdlet testing, and help authoring
research memo scaffold for expanding PowerShell cmdlet workstreams
machine-readable domain taxonomy, rule prefixes, and planned workstream grouping
stable section and domain ordering for rule authoring and discovery

external.title: GitHub Copilot CLI create skills documentation
